trackframe 0.1.7

Package index

Functions

All trackframe package functions.

trackframe() as.trackframe()
Convert an object to a trackframe
calculate_utm_zone_crs()
Calculate which utm zones are appropreate for input data
cbind(<trackframe>)
Combine trackframes by columns
check_trackframe() assert_trackframe() expect_trackframe()
Checkmate style check if x is a trackframe object
cocomo_as_tf()
Converts a cocomo object to a trackframe
crs() `crs<-`()
Extract or Assign from a Track Frame Coordinate Reference System
crs_type()
Extract Coordinate Reference System Type from a Track Frame
deduping()
Deduping of trackframe
df_demo
Artificial Travel Path
guess_all_cols()
Guesses columns
merge(<trackframe>)
Merge Two trackframes
plot(<trackframe>)
Plot trackframes
rbind(<trackframe>)
Combine trackframes by rows
select_id()
Select Tracks by ID from a Track Frame
sort(<trackframe>)
Sorting of Trackframes
split_by_id()
Split trackframe by ID
suggest_utm_zone_crs()
Suggest a utm crs
tf_as_sf() tf_as_sftrack() tf_as_move2()
Convert a Track Frame to Simple Features (sf) Object
tf_as_cocomo()
Convert a track_frame into the cocomo format
tf_as_xyt()
Convert a Track Frame to XYT Format
tf_backtransform()
Backtransform
time_col() `time_col<-`() id_col() `id_col<-`() easting_col() `easting_col<-`() northing_col() `northing_col<-`() tf_colnames() `tf_colnames<-`()
Get and set column names of Trackframe Key columns
easting() `easting<-`() northing() `northing<-`()
Extract or Assign Trackframe coordinates
id() `id<-`()
Extract or Assign Trackframe Track ID
tf_options()
Options for col guessing in trackframe
time(<trackframe>) `time<-`()
Extract or Assign Trackframe Time Index
type_arrows()
Add arrows to a plot
unique_ids()
Extract Unique IDs from a Track Frame

Datasets

Simulated datasets for testing trackframe.

path_data_frame
Simulated Travel Path
path_matrix
Simulated Travel Path
path_move2
Simulated Travel Path
path_sftrack
Simulated Travel Path
path_trackframe
Simulated Travel Path
paths_data_frame
Simulated Travel Path with multiple IDs
paths_matrix
Simulated Travel Path with multiple IDs
paths_move2
Simulated Travel Path with multiple IDs
paths_sftrack
Simulated Travel Path with multiple IDs
paths_trackframe
Simulated Travel Path with multiple IDs
df_mini
Simulated Travel Path
move2_mini
Simulated Travel Path
sftrack_mini
Simulated Travel Path
tf_mini
Simulated Travel Path with multiple IDs
